## InMemoryStateManager Class

In\-memory implementation of [Dapr\.Actors\.Runtime\.IActorStateManager](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/dapr.actors.runtime.iactorstatemanager 'Dapr\.Actors\.Runtime\.IActorStateManager') for unit testing without DAPR runtime\.
Uses two dictionaries to simulate DAPR actor turn\-based commit semantics:
pending state \(uncommitted\) and committed state\.

```csharp
public sealed class InMemoryStateManager : Dapr.Actors.Runtime.IActorStateManager
```
